cit.basis: 25% standard corporate income tax (Corporate Tax Law No. 5520, as amended); 30% for banks and financial institutions.

domestic_minimum_tax.note: From 2025 (Law No. 7524), a domestic minimum corporate tax of 10% of adjusted profit before certain exemptions and deductions applies. Out of scope for this SME estimator.

inflation_adjustment.note: Mandatory inflation adjustment of financial statements under Tax Procedure Law Art. 298 repeating (mükerrer), re-activated FY2024+ when cumulative PPI conditions are met. The estimator's inflation_adjusted flag only records that the supplied profit is already restated; it does not recompute the restatement.

cit.note: Administered by the Revenue Administration (Gelir İdaresi Başkanlığı).

wht.note: Dividend withholding tax reduced from 15% to 10% by Presidential Decree in December 2021; interest WHT varies by instrument and maturity.

vat.note: Standard VAT (KDV) rate raised from 18% to 20% in July 2023; reduced rates of 10% and 1% apply to designated goods and services.

personal_income_tax.note: Progressive personal income tax with brackets from 15% to 40%; bracket thresholds are revalued annually for inflation.

social_insurance.note: SGK social security: employee 14% + 1% unemployment; employer 20.75% + 2% unemployment, with 4-5 percentage-point employer incentives available subject to conditions.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Inflation restatement, domestic minimum tax, exemptions, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
Does not recompute inflation restatement of financial statements (flag-only).
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
